title: Marketing Specialist
responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: MetricWave is hiring a junior marketing specialist to support planning and executing acquisition, retention, and content campaigns.
raw_text: Vacancy V059: Marketing Specialist at MetricWave. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 1.7 years. Required skills: digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management, crm, email marketing. Optional skills: market research, canva. Responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders.
